rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the defect at src/be_vm.c:743 in the opcase(FLIP) handler.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed change to replace arithmetic negation with bitwise complement matches the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains the root cause as a divergence between compile-time and runtime handling of bitwise operations, suggesting a centralized approach to prevent such issues.
